name: Why I am getting this error? - Help - Godot Forum
snippet:
22 Jul 2025 — If you want to use variables from other scripts , those variables must be static, or you need to set the script as a global autoload singleton . Read more
Jul 22, 2025 — If you want to use variables from other scripts, those variables must be static, or you need to set the script as a global autoload singleton .
